summary: Comprehensive backend pytest suite (18 tests) + Playwright mobile-viewport frontend smoke tests. Backend: 18/18 passing after fixing one test-side assertion (email lowercasing). All CRUD + AI (workouts/generate + meals/suggest with gpt-5.4) + summary work end-to-end. Frontend: Login → Home → all 4 secondary tabs (Entraînements, Nutrition, Progrès, Profil) render correctly in French with mint-green/white theme; all screens carry testIDs (home-screen, workouts-screen, nutrition-*, progress-*, profile-*). AI-generated workout ('Prise de masse haut du corps 45 min · 8 exercices') visible on home + workouts list.

minor.issue: Returns 403 (HTTPBearer) instead of 401. Not a blocker but semantically 401 would be more correct.

ui_bugs.issue: Tab buttons have no testID (tab-home / tab-workouts / etc.). Navigation via text works but automated testing has to rely on text selectors.

issues: Console warnings: `shadow*` style props deprecated -> use `boxShadow`; `props.pointerEvents` deprecated -> use `style.pointerEvents`. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional/LOW) Add testID to Tabs.Screen tabBarButton in app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx (e.g. tab-home, tab-workouts, tab-nutrition, tab-progress, tab-profile) for easier automation.
(Optional/LOW) Replace deprecated shadow* / pointerEvents props with boxShadow / style.pointerEvents to silence RN Web warnings.
(Optional) Consider returning 401 (not 403) when Authorization header is missing on protected routes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 537-line file – acceptable for MVP but consider splitting (auth/, workouts/, meals/, measurements/) if it grows.
All Mongo queries correctly exclude _id via projection – good.
JWT_SECRET committed in .env with '-change-me-' – fine for dev, must rotate before prod.
generate_workout / suggest_meals correctly wrap LLM call and parse JSON robustly (fence strip + first{..last} slice).
seed_data_creation: Registered several ephemeral TEST_<uuid>@bp.com users during pytest run. All test-created workouts / meals / measurements are deleted at the end of each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend testIDs discovered: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, login-goto-register, home-screen, home-greeting, home-calories-remaining, home-next-workout, home-quick-generate, home-quick-meal, workouts-screen, workouts-fab-generate, workout-card-<id>, nutrition-screen, nutrition-consumed, nutrition-add-meal, nutrition-ai-suggest, nutrition-empty, progress-screen, progress-add, progress-empty, profile-screen, profile-name, profile-goal-row, profile-logout. Bottom tabs use text (Accueil / Entraînements / Nutrition / Progrès / Profil) with NO testIDs – use get_by_text(..., exact=True).first.click(force=True). Backend AI endpoints are slow (~15-30s) – use timeout >= 90s in tests.
rca_of_issue: N/A – no blocking bugs. One test-side failure was due to backend correctly lower-casing emails on register; test now compares against email.lower().
